text:
Hawaii Standard Time (HST) was UTC-10:30 in 1942.  
Europe/Paris was UTC+1 (or UTC+2 if DST; assume standard time in August 1942? Actually Paris was under German occupation using CET (UTC+1) year-round in 1942).  
Time difference: UTC+1 − (UTC-10:30) = 11 hours 30 minutes ahead.  
5:00 PM HST + 11h30m = 4:30 AM next day (August 13, 1942).  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1942-08-13 04:30
